**Subject:** Last chance: your subscription will be deactivated soon

**From:** Atlassian Loom <noreply@po.atlassian.net>

**Message:**
Atlassian
[https://commerce-cdn.prod.atl-paas.net/logos/id-summit/id-summit-email_logo_360x80_NEW.png]http://www.atlassian.com


THIS DOESN’T HAVE TO BE GOODBYE



home
[https://commerce-cdn.prod.atl-paas.net/illustration-library/Atlassian-Home.png]

Hi Zeenat,

It’s not too late to keep the work you’ve done so far! This is your last chance
to add payment details before your subscription is deactivated. At that point,
you’ll lose product access, and your data will be permanently deleted soon
after.

 * Loom, Monthly, Business + AI (USD, Default, 23-10-2024) (E-44C-726-4TE-W6Y) |
   zinatyamin.atlassian.net

Your total estimated bill is USD 24.00 (excludes tax)

Add payment details
[https://track.atlassian.com/tracking/4bcc8667-3638-4763-aacc-5948049d68a2?m=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..PWK61vjgtcPNoi7kRWgGkaFOGGfWKLdo-03RqStgOUo&j=1]

Once you add payment details, we’ll process payment from the start of your
billing cycle.

Remember, you can switch back to a Free plan at any time by reducing your user
count
[https://track.atlassian.com/tracking/12807b7b-1e79-4bfb-bc58-7201dcc72882?m=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..PWK61vjgtcPNoi7kRWgGkaFOGGfWKLdo-03RqStgOUo&j=1].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Please contact us
[https://track.atlassian.com/tracking/471e89c1-347a-41e5-a4af-da5eb8800b2d?m=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..PWK61vjgtcPNoi7kRWgGkaFOGGfWKLdo-03RqStgOUo&j=1]
with any questions, we're always happy to help.

Thanks,
The Atlassian team
